name: New Taipei (Taiwan)
description: A white field charged at the centre with the New Taipei city emblem and wordmark.
history: New Taipei City (Xinbei Shi), formed on 25 December 2010 from the upgrading of the former Taipei County, completely surrounds the capital Taipei and is Taiwan's most populous administrative subdivision. The current city flag and emblem were adopted at the time of the city's establishment. The motif represents the mountains and rivers of the metropolitan basin and the dynamic, modern character of the new municipality.

features.role: New Taipei city emblem and wordmark
features.symbolism: abstract motif of mountains and rivers in white and green, representing the natural geography of New Taipei and its modern, dynamic identity
